hero.title: Yore ma ji nyalo yudogo
hero.lead: IATF dwaro ni websaitno obed mayot somo kendo tiyo kode mana ka ng'ato tiyo gi keyboard.
support: Kuom web accessibility, IATF tiyo gi [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Tiyo gi yore mopogore opogore mag konyo ji ng'eyo dhok ma giwinjo bende konyo ahinya.

header.title: Lando wach moro motudore gi yo ma ji nyalo donjogo e websaitno

paragraphs: Ka inwang'o gima geng'o ng'ato donjo e websaitni, kwayi ni ior ripot e e-mail:
items: teknoloji makonyo, browser, kata gima itiyogo, ka dwarore
report.footnote: Ok ochuno ni indik ripot ma achiel kachiel e wi bugno.

header.title: Loso weche motudore gi wach sirkal

paragraphs: Weche motudore gi yudo weche e Intanet inyalo ket e yo machuok e kar kano weche ma yudore e intanet mondo okony ji ng'eyo kaka inyalo los wechego.
Kapo ni ripot ma ichiwo oting'o weche maling'ling', wach mano ayanga e wach mibiro ndiko.
Websaitni oting'o mana weche machuok kendo ok odonjre gi gimoro amora. Loko moko mag dhokgo nyalo bedo ni pok orumo chuth sama itimo tij loko.
